evals.prompt: Enable Opus/Fable thinking summaries in my VS Code Claude Code extension by applying the patch.
assertions: The --thinking-display chokepoint is rewritten so an omitted display defaults to "summarized"
A pristine .js.orig backup is created for the modified bundle
Re-running the patch is idempotent (reports ALREADY PATCHED and makes no further change)

evals.prompt: Undo the thinking-display patch and restore my extension to its original state.
assertions: restore reverts the patched bundle byte-for-byte to the pristine original
the .js.orig backup is consumed/removed after restore
